receiptGuide.title: Do you have the receipt digitally?
receiptGuide.intro: Many apps store receipts — export as PDF or image and upload here.
receiptGuide.step1: Open the app where the receipt is (e.g. Kivra, bank, email, Wallet)
receiptGuide.step2: Open the receipt → Save, Share or Download as PDF or image
receiptGuide.step3: Come back here and choose Select from files
receiptGuide.examplesAria: Examples of apps with digital receipts
receiptGuide.kivraStep1: Open Kivra and find the receipt under purchases or documents.
receiptGuide.kivraStep2: Tap the receipt and choose share or save — often as PDF.
receiptGuide.kivraStep3: Save the PDF and choose the file here — no need to convert it to a screenshot.

page.title: Add to home screen
page.subtitle: Quick shortcut to your pantry — like an app, without the App Store.

guide.title: Install Home Pantry
guide.lead: Add a home screen shortcut to open your pantry in one tap — camera and offline work better in the installed view.
guide.alreadyInstalled: You are already using the installed app. Nice!
guide.iosStep1: Open home-pantry--home-pantry-4bee5.europe-west4.hosted.app in Safari (not an in-app browser from other apps).
guide.iosStep2: Tap the Share button (square with arrow up).
guide.iosStep3: Choose Add to Home Screen and confirm.
guide.iosHint: On iPad: same steps in Safari.
guide.androidStep2: Tap the menu (⋮) in the top right.
guide.androidStep3: Choose Install app or Add to Home screen.
guide.androidHint: If you do not see Install app, use Add to Home screen in the menu.
guide.desktopNote: On desktop, use the app in your browser. Mobile with a home screen icon works best.

install.accepted: Install started — follow your browser’s dialog.
install.dismissed: Install cancelled. You can follow the steps below instead.

recipe.label: Recipe ideas

onboarding.welcomeBody: Keep track of what you have at home — without filling the entire pantry at once. Start with one receipt or a few barcodes.
onboarding.chooseBody: One receipt adds many items at once. Five barcodes is enough if you want to try the scan flow.
onboarding.celebrateBody: You have added your first items. Keep going at your own pace — scan more whenever it suits you.
onboarding.scanBody: Scan barcodes with the camera to add items in seconds. Find the scan button at the bottom on mobile.
onboarding.locationsBody: Split your stock by where items are stored. Tap a location on the home screen to view and edit contents.
onboarding.shareBody: Invite family or housemates under Settings. Switch between households via the menu at the top if you have several pantries.
onboarding.readyBody: Start by scanning a few items or adding manually. The guide is shown once — you can always open it again under Settings.
